name: RV pacing and AF risk correlation
description: Clinical data shows that each 1% increase in cumulative right-ventricular (RV) pacing is associated with a 1% increase in risk of atrial fibrillation (AF) for pacemaker patients. This metric establishes a direct quantitative relationship between RV pacing and AF risk, limited to patients with cardiovascular implantable electronic devices and bounded by cumulative pacing percentage.
